stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani's 53-Game On-Base Streak Ends — He Pitched 6 Scoreless Innings in the Same Game

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani's 53-game on-base streak is over. ⚾

He went 0-for-4 against the Giants on Wednesday.
He also pitched 6 scoreless innings in the same game.

The streak dated to August 24, 2025.
Longest ever by a Japanese-born MLB player.

#Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
53 games. Ohtani's on-base streak just ended. ⚾

2nd longest in Dodgers history.
Longest ever by a Japanese-born player.

Roberts is mulling more rest on pitching days.
6 scoreless IP pitched in the same loss.

#Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Shohei Ohtani's 53-Game On-Base Streak Ends — He Also Threw 6 Scoreless Innings That Night

stories.title: **Headline:** Mets Snap 12-Game Losing Streak 3-2 Over Twins — But Lose Lindor to Calf Tightness

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Mets won. ⚾

3-2 Twins. 12-game losing streak: over.

Mark Vientos: go-ahead RBI single in the 8th.
Luke Weaver: got the final out.
Juan Soto returned.

Mets are 8-16. Francisco Lindor: left with calf tightness.
Nothing is simple in Flushing. #Mets #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Mets haven't won since April 7. They just won. ⚾

12-game losing streak — the longest in 24 years in Flushing.

Historic stat: no team has ever made the postseason after a
12-game losing streak in April.

The Mets are 8-16. The climb starts now. #Mets #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge Leads MLB with 9 Home Runs — 5 in the First Inning, On Pace for 66

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge in the first inning this season: ⚾

.450 average. 1.726 OPS. 5 home runs.

5 of his MLB-leading 9 HRs have come before
the lineup turns over once.

He's on pace for 66 home runs.
The Yankees are 11-3 when they score first.

#Yankees #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Dodgers Set Franchise HR Record — 42 Home Runs Through 22 Games

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers hit a franchise record 42 home runs in their first 22 games. ⚾

Max Muncy: 8. Dalton Rushing: 7.

They set the record in a loss Wednesday.
That's how deep the power lineup is.

Dodgers: 16-7. #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Yoshinobu Murakami at 7 HRs Through 21 Games — Sets Record for Japanese-Born Players

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Yoshinobu Murakami has 7 home runs through 21 MLB games. ⚾

That's more than any Japanese-born player through their first 21.
He surpassed Shohei Ohtani (5 HRs in first 21 games).

The 2026 season has been a Japanese baseball showcase.
Now add Murakami to the list. #WhiteSox #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Cincinnati Reds Lead NL Central at 16-8 — Chase Burns Anchors the Surprise

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Reds are 16-8. ⚾

NL Central leaders. Best start since 2006.
Chase Burns is anchoring the rotation.

Cincinnati wasn't on anyone's radar entering the season.
They don't care. They're winning. #Reds #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** MLB Power Rankings Surprise: NL Central's 5 Teams All Above .500

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
All five NL Central teams have winning records. ⚾

The Padres went from 2-5 to 10-6.
The Mets were supposed to win the NL East.
The Red Sox were supposed to be back.

The standings don't look like the preseason picks.
That's why they play the games. #MLB
